question: Emi not deducted
answer: If you have maintained sufficient funds in your bank account but the EMI was not deducted, please ensure that the required amount is available until the 5th of every month, as the deduction happens automatically through ECS mode. If the deduction does not happen by then, you will need to make the payment manually by visiting the loan details page.

question: What is the death claim process for a fixed deposit?
answer:
If a primary depositor passes away and there is no nominee or joint account holder for that fixed deposit, then the legal heir needs to submit the following documents:- An application for the deceased’s claim (mandatory)
- A certified copy of the death certificate (mandatory)
- A succession certification or letter of administration or probate of the will (recommended but not mandatory)
- An indemnity bond that is taken from the legal heir/representative (mandatory)

question: I want to add nominee.
answer: Yes, you can change the name of the nominee. However, the name of the co-applicant cannot be changed. To change the name of the nominee, Please follow these steps: Select “Your Relation,” choose your “Fixed Deposit,” and click on the Fixed Deposit number in which you wish to make the changes. Then click on “More Services,” select “Add Nominee,” enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number, fill in the required details, and submit the request., CTA Label: Your relations, Android CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://relations/deposits, iOS CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://relations/deposits, Web CTA Link: https://www.bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Loan_FD

question: Is it necessary for me to do E-Mandate registration?
answer: Yes, this is mandatory if you have availed loan or applying for a Fixed Deposit Plan from us.You can either do the registration online or offline. Mandate/NACH registration allows for easy auto-debiting of payments/ EMIs/ investments from your registered bank account basis the agreed frequency.If you prefer doing this offline, visit the branch closest to you and our representatives will help you.

question: What are the steps to set up an E-Mandate? How do I register my mandate if my bank is not participating…
answer: You can set up an E-Mandate online while applying for a loan or applying for a Fixed Deposit Plan. You can register E-Mandate either using your net banking or debit card details and validate by entering an OTP sent to your registered mobile number. However, the availability of these options depends on your bank.

question: How can I get my Form 121?
answer: Your Form 121 comes pre-filled for your convenience, making the process even more simpler.View your Form 121 for your Systematic Deposit Plan by selecting the relevant Deposit Number displayed on your screen.To view now, CTA Label: Document center, Android CTA Link:bajajsuperapp://documenation/documentcenter, iOS CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://documenation/documentcenter, Web CTA Link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=Document.
